calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Angelica Ervin (415.937.4196; angelicace712@gmail.com) judgment debtor in propria persona.
Jonathan Vaknin, Esq. specially appearing on behalf of judgment creditor via Zoom videoconference.

The Court notes there was no compliance with tentative ruling rule for appearances and allows oral argument.

DISCUSSED. (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF BH FINANCIAL SERVICES INC.'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION:

The claim of exemption is granted. Defendant demonstrates that the funds in her account are necessary for the support of defendant and her daughter. (See CCP 704.225.)

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
